title: Remove admin role gate — make Admin panel directly accessible without authentication check

requirements.text: Remove the administrator role/authentication guard from the AdminPanel page (frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx) so that navigating to the /admin route renders the admin panel directly without showing the 'Access Denied' screen. The panel should be accessible to any user who navigates to /admin, with no role check, no Internet Identity requirement, and no redirect away from the panel.

quotes: Access Denied — You don't have administrator privileges
I'll remove the strict role gate so the Admin panel at /admin is directly accessible without requiring a pre-existing admin account.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin loads the AdminPanel component immediately without any authentication prompt.
The 'Access Denied' screen with the shield icon is never shown when visiting /admin.
No role check or Internet Identity login is required to view the admin panel.
All admin sections (Dashboard, Users, Technicians, Bookings, Services, Reports) remain fully functional after removing the gate.
The 'Back to home' fallback screen is removed or unreachable via /admin.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts.
Do not change the backend RBAC logic — only the frontend gate in AdminPanel.tsx should be removed.
nonGoals: Adding any new authentication mechanism for the admin panel.
Changing the backend role definitions or access control.
Modifying any customer or technician frontend screens.
